parties.name: THE BRIAN J. AND TANYA R. MADISON LIVING TRUST, dated February 23, 2006

legal_description.value: Lot 46, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180.

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Roberts family conveyance to the Madison Living Trust. This is the instrument that vests title into the trust that later appears as grantor on the real 2013-02-27 POPHAM purchase (20130183449). Trust execution date (2006-02-23) matches the trust_execution_date extracted-field on 20130183449 by design — the synthetic record is calibrated to that real OCR value. Cash purchase from Roberts to the newly-formed Madison trust (no concurrent DOT); the Madisons did not record a purchase-money DOT in the demo corpus, which is why no 2006-era DOT appears in this chain. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

names: BRIAN J AND TANYA R MADISON LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUAR
raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only Roberts-to-Madison-Trust conveyance. Trust execution date deliberately matches the 2006-02-23 value OCR'd from the real 2013 POPHAM purchase deed (20130183449), so the synthetic chain aligns with real downstream data. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
